description_long: This is a compact, white coupe car with a modern, boxy design and a slightly raised roofline, giving it a practical yet sporty appearance. The front features a wide black grille, dual round headlights, and a small hood scoop, while the rear is characterized by simple rectangular taillights and a single exhaust pipe. The side profile reveals two doors, black side mirrors, and dark-tinted windows, with subtle aerodynamic lines running along the body. The car sits on black alloy wheels with red brake calipers, adding a touch of sportiness. The lower body panels and bumpers are finished in a contrasting light beige color, providing visual separation from the main body. The overall design suggests a utilitarian yet stylish urban vehicle, likely intended for city driving and short commutes.
description: A compact, white two-door coupe car with a boxy silhouette, black alloy wheels, and contrasting beige lower panels. Features include a wide front grille, tinted windows, and sporty red brake calipers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide black grille, dual round headlights, hood scoop, and black side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door configuration, black alloy wheels, tinted windows, and beige lower panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays simple rectangular taillights, a single exhaust pipe, and a clean, flat trunk area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the two-door layout, window configuration, and sporty wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
